title: Product vs. Process Quality Management
description: A side-by-side comparison diagram illustrating the key focus areas, activities, and outcomes of product quality management versus process quality management in software engineering.
relationships: Product Quality focuses on the attributes and standards of the final deliverable (the product), while Process Quality focuses on the efficiency and effectiveness of the methods used to create it. Both are interconnected, as a high-quality process is often necessary to produce a high-quality product consistently.
